=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (3:7-3:14) TS6133: 'program' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (4:3-4:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/flatMapToMap_preview.ts ---
import { Effect } from "effect"

const program = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((value) => value + 1)
)
